privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified as accurate. The task operates on synthetic WooCommerce data created by setup scripts. Customer Michael Chen (michael.chen@example.com) is created via WP-CLI in setup_task.sh. Products are created in setup_woocommerce.sh: Organic Cotton T-Shirt (SKU: OCT-BLK-M, price: $24.99) and Merino Wool Sweater (SKU: MWS-GRY-L, price: $89.99). Task requires removing the T-Shirt from an 'On Hold' order and adding the Sweater with quantity 1, then recalculating totals.
